styleGuide.approach: painterly gouache with visible brushwork, soft edges, organic silhouettes, warm earthy palette; transparent PNG background; centered subject with a soft cast shadow pooled beneath it; no text, borders, or UI chrome
paletteConstraints: fungal accents restricted to kind: hyphae sage green #7a8a3a / #9bb04a, rhizomorph cool grey #bfc4c9 / #8a9099, fruiting mushroom purple #8a4fa8 / #c080ff, decomposer ochre tan #c08040 / #e0a868
no pure black, no pure white — lift shadows, temper highlights
composition: light source consistently from top-left, shadow bottom-right
soft radial shadow pooled beneath subject on transparent background
slight asymmetry — organic, hand-painted, never mechanically perfect
consistency: identical lighting direction, shadow falloff and brush roughness across the mycelium-family chain
no flat vector fills — every surface carries a gradient or scumble
silhouettes remain distinct at small sizes (read clearly at 48px)
no outlines or ink lines — forms separated by value and hue

phaseTinting.left: engine multiplies icon by fungal green (#9bb04a) for the player's colony — keep the base art hue-neutral enough that a green multiply still reads correctly
phaseTinting.right: engine multiplies icon by rust orange (#c46a3a) for the enemy's colony — same neutrality constraint

icons.object: a circular mat of hyphal threads lying on damp bark
icons.description: webbed network of fine sage-green threads radiating from a dense tufted center out to a soft feathered edge; threads taper and overlap; the mat fills a round footprint with no stem — it hugs the ground
icons.use: hyphae structure — replaces the flat green disc inside a slot circle

icons.object: a braided mycelial cord coiled into a tight rosette
icons.description: thick silver-grey root-like cord wound into a spiral; visible braided twists, bright highlights along the ridges and darker recesses between them; a few frayed tips escape the coil
icons.use: rhizomorph structure — braided spiral sits in a slot circle
icons.chainNote: same painterly lighting and scale as hyphae; silhouette is a raised coil rather than a flat mat; silver-grey replaces sage green

icons.object: a small cluster of purple-capped mushrooms growing from bark
icons.description: three or four mushrooms of different sizes, deep purple caps with a wet sheen, cream gills visible under the tilted caps, pale cream stems; the cluster leans slightly, asymmetric
icons.use: fruiting structure — mushroom cluster rises out of a slot circle
icons.chainNote: same painterly lighting as hyphae; upright 3D silhouette replaces the flat mat; mushroom purple is the only accent

icons.object: a rotting patch of bark colonised by ochre rot
icons.description: irregular ochre-tan patch eating into horizontal wood grain; ragged soft-edged border, a darker wet center where the wood has broken down, a few powdery cream spore flecks scattered around the rim
icons.use: decomposer structure — flat rot patch inside a slot circle
icons.chainNote: same painterly lighting as hyphae; stays flat to the surface like hyphae but ochre tan replaces sage green; texture is wet and broken-down rather than threadlike

icons.object: a pulsing fungal sclerotium — a rounded bulb with a glowing core
icons.description: semi-translucent rounded node embedded in bark; cream-lit inner core bleeds through a darker outer skin; a halo of fine wispy threads fans outward from the rim; slightly lumpy, organic silhouette
icons.use: colony heart — replaces the plain circle at each end of the log; the engine applies side-tint (green for player, orange for enemy) via phaseTinting

icons.object: a seamless tile of damp rotting bark
icons.description: dark brown bark grain running horizontally with deep vertical cracks, occasional moss tufts and small pale lichen patches; subtle wetness in the recesses; tiles cleanly along both axes with no visible seam
icons.use: log body texture — tiled across the log rectangle beneath every structure

icons.object: a single wispy puff of spore dust
icons.description: soft cream cloudlet with fuzzy asymmetric edges fading fully to transparent; no hard outline; reads as a dry powdery puff rather than smoke
icons.use: drifting spore particles emitted from sclerotia and during fruiting bursts

icons.description: soft cream core with a warm halo fading to transparent; perfectly round, no hard outline; slightly warmer in the center
icons.use: ambient glow specks near sclerotia and along pressure pulses
icons.chainNote: tighter and rounder than the spore puff; same soft-edged fade to transparent

icons.object: a wide horizontal illustration of a damp forest floor with a fallen log in the foreground
icons.description: moss beds, fern fronds, scattered leaf litter, a few distant mushrooms catching a shaft of warm light; soft warm fog thickens toward the edges; the central foreground log is kept blank and flat so the game's own log rectangle draws cleanly on top
icons.use: scene background behind the log and HUD
